njit.name: New Jersey Institute of Technology
njit.info: The main campus of the New Jersey Institute of Technology (NJIT) is located at University Heights, Newark, New Jersey 07102-1982.
njit.location: The address of N.J.I.T is three hunded twenty three Doctor Martin Luther King Junior Boulevard, Newark, NJ 07102.

parking.name: Summit Parking Deck
parking.info: The primary lot for students, visitors, faculty, and staff with valid permits.

parking.name: Science and Technology Parking Garage
parking.info: The S.T.P.G is a multi-level parking deck primarly used for students, faculty, and staff with valid permits.

parking.name: Lot 3 Student Mall Lot
parking.info: Lot 3 Student Mall Lot is for faculty and staff only.
parking.location: 134 Summit Street, in front of the Student Mall.

parking.name: Lot 5 Warren Parking Lot
parking.info: Lot 5 Warren Parking Lot is for faculty and staff only.
parking.location: Warren Street, in front of Tiernan Hall and Faculty Memorial Hall (F.M.H)

parking.name: Lot 7 Bleeker Parking Lot
parking.info: Lot 7 Bleeker Parking Lot is for faculty and staff only.
parking.location: 170 Central Avenue, next to the Central Avenue Building.

parking.name: NJIT West Parking Deck
parking.info: The NJIT West Parking Deck is often used for student and visitor parking, but also for faculty and staff.
parking.location: 14-62 Sylvia Jackson Way, right next to Science and Technology Parking Garage.

parking.name: Lot 16 New Street Parking
parking.info: Lot 16 New Street Parking is used for faculty and staff only
parking.location: 269 New Street, by the Science and Technology Parking Garage.

parking.name: Fenster Parking Level 1
parking.info: The Fenster Parking Level 1 is used for reserved faculty and staff.
parking.location: 144 New Street, next to Central King Building (C.K.B).

parking.name: Fenster Parking Level 2
parking.info: The Fenster Parking Level 2 is used for faculty and staff only.
parking.location: 144 New Street, next to Central King Building (C.K.B).

parking.name: Maple Hall Parking
parking.info: The Maple Hall Parking consists of a 1 story parking garage (lower level). Available for students, faculty, and staff with valid NJIT hang tag.
parking.location: 200 Warren Street, within the NJIT Maple Hall residence building.

parking.name: Essex County College Parking Deck
parking.info: Essex County College Parking Deck has 100 parking spaces available to NJIT hang tag holders, Monday through Thursday between 7 AM and 10 PM. Park on the top level.

restrooms.name: restroom
restrooms.info: There are several restrooms in campus.
restrooms.location: The restrooms have been pinned. Check the map!

library.name: Van Houten Library
library.info: The Van Houten Library is the primary quiet study spot, located near Central Avenue.
library.location: Next to the Mechanical Engineering Building (MECH), across from the Campus Center (C.C)

ecec.name: Helen and John C. Hartmann of Electrical and Computer Engineering Center
ecec.info: The Electrical and Computer Engineering Center, known as the E.C.E or E.C.E.C building, is the primary facility for the E.C.E Department.
ecec.location: At the corner of Warren and Summer Street. Main entrance with glass doors facing Warren Street.
ecec.connection: Connected to the Faculty Memorial Hall (F.M.H) via the second floor.

fmh.name: Faculty Memorial Hall
fmh.info: The Faculty Memorial Hall, known as F.M.H, is a building for instructional classrooms and engineering labs. It is physically connected to the E.C.E.C building on the second floor. It also has the Microelectronics Center.
fmh.location: Located between the E.C.E.C building and Kupfrian Hall. Next to Tiernan Hall.

tiernan.name: Tiernan Hall
tiernan.info: Tiernan Hall is a building for science education, housing the departments of Chemistry and Physics. It is known for its large lecture halls, classrooms, and numerous research laboratories.
tiernan.location: Located at 161 Warren Street, next to the Faculty Memorial Hall (F.M.H) and the Wellness and Events Center (WEC).

wec.name: Joel and Diane Bloom Wellness and Events Center
wec.info: The Joel and Diane Bloom Wellness and Events Center, known as the WEC, is NJIT's premier athletic and recreational facility. It serves as a home for NJIT Highlander Athletics and is a major social hub for students.
wec.location: Located at 100 Lock Street, next to Tiernan Hall and adjacent to the athletic fields.

campus_center.name: Campus Center
campus_center.info: The Campus Center is the main student hub at NJIT, offering dining, lounges, meeting spaces, recreation, and student services.
campus_center.location: 150 Bleeker Street, next to Kupfrian Hall and adjacent to the Green.

bookstore.name: NJIT Bookstore
bookstore.info: The NJIT Bookstore is the official campus source for textbooks, apparel, and supplies.
bookstore.location: Located in Specht Building at 120 Summit Street (corner of Warren St.)

hours.note: Hours may vary during holidays and university breaks.

colton.name: Colton Hall
colton.info: Colton Hall is a historic campus building housing classrooms, offices, and research labs for Civil and Environmental Engineering and Architecture studios.
colton.location: Along Summit Street, situated between Campbell Hall and Weston Hall.

weston.name: Weston Hall
weston.info: Weston Hall is the primary hub for the Hillier College of Architecture and Design (HCAD).
weston.location: Along Martin Luther King Junior Boulevard at corner of Warren Street.
weston.connection: Physically interconnected with Colton Hall and Campbell Hall. Accessible from campus via an elevated walkway ramp.
